calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-10-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Ronny Maidenberg, Esq. for Petitioner: Barbara A. Park present as guardian ad litem for and with Bria Park: a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Compromise: $17,00.00
Attorney's fees: $4,054.84
Costs $780.63
A net balance of $12,164.53 to be deposited into a blocked account with Dean Witter, 1 Kaiser Plaza, Suite 900, Oakland, CA. 94612, until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. Case settled. The order to show cause is re-set for 7/20/2004 at 10:00 am in Dept. 212. CRC 225 Calendar. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger. (212)
